message:
feat(persist,server,store): ensure crash-safe persistence, add BRPOPLPUSH, fix mtime tracking

Crash Safety (fr-persist):
- Add drop(file) before rename in AOF/RDB write functions to ensure
  all data is flushed before atomic rename
- Implement sync_parent_dir() to fsync parent directory after rename,
  ensuring directory entry updates survive power loss

Server (fr-server):
- Add BRPOPLPUSH blocking right-pop-left-push command with deadline
  handling for timeout support

Store (fr-store):
- Refactor APPEND, SETRANGE, SETBIT to use in-place mutations with
  proper entry.touch(now_ms) calls for mtime tracking
- Fix LMOVE, LPUSH, RPUSH, LINSERT, SMOVE to update access time
  on mutation, ensuring correct TTL and LRU behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
